query:
INSERT INTO revenue_groups (groupId, `name`, `type`, customerExternalId, customerName, totalRevenue, autoDetected)
SELECT
  CONCAT('data-', svc.customerExternalId, '-', CAST(svc.monthlyRevenue AS CHAR)) AS groupId,
  'Data - Internet' AS grpName,
  'data_bundle' AS grpType,
  svc.customerExternalId,
  MIN(svc.customerName) AS customerName,
  svc.monthlyRevenue AS totalRevenue,
  1 AS autoDetected
FROM services svc
WHERE
  svc.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (svc.revenueGroupId IS NULL OR svc.revenueGroupId = '')
  AND svc.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND svc.customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    svc.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  )
GROUP BY svc.customerExternalId, svc.monthlyRevenue
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE groupId = groupId;
